mentions.note: Expensive software-as-a-service company pivoting rapidly; mixed fundamentals. Better than most enterprise software peers, but not a buy at current levels in today's cautious environment.
SaaS out of style alongside Salesforce, Adobe, Workday due to AI efficiency fears (fewer users = lower per-seat revenue).
Software rebound sharply higher today after recent weakness; benefiting from rebalancing flows and AI/data-center tailwinds.
Enterprise software group leader, up 5% today; part of rotation but sustainability questionable given prior reversal patterns.
Software stock in disfavored category. Market rotation away from software toward hardware/infrastructure.
Hammered on AI displacement fears dragging SaaS; analyst meeting Monday will reveal if customers shortening contracts; SaaS group fired up today.
